name: Pumpkin Spice Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can (26 oz) Evaporated Skimmed Milk, 2 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender or food processor.
2. Blend until well mixed and smooth.
3. Transfer the mixture to a large bowl and refrigerate for several hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Before serving, sprinkle with nutmeg to taste as desired.
